title: uragoga ignea
side_effects: Uragoga ignea can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps due to its potent and volatile compounds. Overconsumption of the plant can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Furthermore, uragoga ignea may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate pre-existing health conditions, such as high blood pressure and diabetes. Prolonged use without proper medical guidance can result in long-term damage to the digestive system and kidneys.
